footer.description: Providing premium medical assistance for travelers and tourists across Latin America. 24/7 care wherever you are.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get health tips for travelers directly in your inbox.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Doctor IN. All rights reserved. Built for travelers across Latin America.

home.desc: Certified doctors — at your hotel, home or anywhere in Latin America. Available 24/7 in English, French, German & more.
home.stepsTitle: Get Medical Help in 3 Easy Steps
home.stepsDesc: No need to navigate a foreign healthcare system alone. We handle everything.
home.step1Desc: Call, WhatsApp or book online. We respond in minutes in your language.
home.step2Desc: A certified specialist comes to your hotel, home or clinic near you.
home.step3Desc: Receive prescription, lab referrals and follow-up care digitally.
home.specTitle: The Best Specialists Ready to Assist in Your Emergency
home.specDesc: Our premium network of certified, multilingual doctors is on call 24/7. Get immediate standard or emergency medical care right at your hotel, home, or office, without language barriers.
home.specialistCard1Desc: Access board-certified general practitioners and medical specialists, fully licensed and thoroughly verified.
home.specialistCard2Desc: Consult with professionals who speak English, Spanish, French, German, or Portuguese for clear communication.
home.specialistCard3Desc: Skip long waiting times at local clinics; our doctors travel directly to your hotel, Airbnb, or residence.
home.specialistJoinTitle: Are you a qualified medical specialist?
home.specialistJoinDesc: Join our premium healthcare network and assist international travelers and expats. We offer flexible schedules, standard-setting coordination, and competitive compensation.
home.servicesDesc: Premium medical services tailored for international travelers and expats.
home.testDesc: Real stories from international travelers and expats who trusted Doctor In.
home.blogTitle: Health Tips for Travelers in Latin America
home.blogDesc: Expert advice on staying healthy during your Latin American adventure.
home.ctaDesc: Don't wait. Our medical team is on call 24/7. We speak your language and come to you.

services.emergencyCareDesc: Immediate medical response across Latin America. Doctor dispatched to your location within 30 min.
services.appointmentDesc: Schedule a visit with a specialist in English, French or German. Available same day.
services.specialistDesc: Cardiology, dermatology, pediatrics, and more. International-standard care in your language.
services.labsDesc: Receive your prescription digitally. Coordinated with labs and pharmacies near you.

about.heroDesc: We bridge the gap between international travelers and quality medical care across Latin America, ensuring you're never alone when you need help most.
about.missionP1: Traveling in a foreign country is an incredible experience, but a medical emergency can quickly turn it into a stressful ordeal. Language barriers, unfamiliar healthcare systems, and lack of immediate access to trusted professionals are common challenges.
about.missionP2: Our mission is to provide seamless, premium, and immediate medical assistance to expats and tourists across Latin America. Whether it's a minor consultation at your hotel or an urgent emergency, we bring the best doctors directly to you.
about.teamDesc: Meet the directors and lead specialists behind our trusted medical network.
about.ctaDesc: Our network covers all major cities in Latin America. Available 24/7 at your doorstep.

values.languageDesc: All our doctors are fluent in English, and many speak French, German, and Portuguese.
values.timeDesc: Medical emergencies don't have a schedule. We are available round the clock, 365 days a year.
values.certDesc: Only board-certified specialists with rigorous background checks make it to our network.

contact.heroDesc: We are available 24/7 for medical emergencies and standard consultations across major cities in Latin America.
contact.directDesc: Our support team speaks English, French, and Spanish. Call us anytime.
contact.successDesc: Thank you for reaching out to Doctor In. Our support team has received your message and will get back to you via email within

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The link might be broken, or the page has been moved. Don't worry, our medical team is still here for you!
